description:
Honest, open-source system cleaning for Windows — no telemetry, no dark patterns.

OpenClean shows an honest picture of your Windows PC and cleans only what you choose - temp files, caches, startup entries, duplicates and more. No fake speed boosts, no invented problems, no account, no background service, and no telemetry. Every number you see is a real meansurement. Free and open source; a portable singel-file build runs from a USB stick with no installation and no .NET required
First public release: overview dashboard, storage & RAM, cleanup with preview, startup manager, privacy scanner, uninstaller with leftover scan, and a SHA-256 duplicate finder. 7 languages.
